title: Gardenia
description: Gardenia. It's a project thats strictly a deco mod, adding multiple new plants, some tools and building block to decorate your gardens!
body:
**[Join our discord to report bugs/issues/crashes or add suggestions, or even just to talk with our community!](https://discord.gg/snB52BC4qn)**

Gardenia is a deco mod focused on adding plenty of new flowers and plants, decorative blocks or even new tools helping with gardening! Download this mod and play, explore your world searching for new plants and build your amazing gardens. 

**Fabric requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)**

~~_This mod will add more stuff with upcomming updates._~~
